Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Orhanizuyty navkolo spilʹnykh problem. Znajdity svojikhʹ lyudey. Diyty razom.

Footer.mission: Zminyty bilʹshe na krashche u nashomu zhytti, nizh mi smiyemosya uyavlyaty sobi, shcho mozhlyvo.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Zmina ne maye buty holosnoyu, shchob buty potuzhnoyu
Home.description: Znajdity lyudey, yaki podilʹyayutʹ vashi problemy. Diyty razom. Quiet Riots z'yednuye lyudey navkolo spilʹnykh frustraciy i peretvoruye skarghy na kolektyvnu diyu.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Poshukayty bud-yaku frustraciyuyu — poyizdy, shyrokosmuha, NHS, klima. Yaksho vona isnuye, my pokazhemo vam, skilʹky inshykh yiyi podilʹyayutʹ.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Pohledajte tu samu problemu dlya vsikh orhanizaciy, abo vsi problemy v odniyi orhanizaciyi. Yak tanho-tancyuky, shcho zminyuyutʹ napryam.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideyi, diyi ta spilʹnota — personalizovani dlya vashoho chasu ta navychok. Mali diyi pryvodyatʹ do velykykh zmin.
Home.missionQuote: "Zminyty bilʹshe na krashche u nashomu zhytti, nizh mi smiyemosya uyavlyaty sobi, shcho mozhlyvo."
Home.basedOn: Gruntuyetsya na knyzci 2014 roku Quiet Riots Saymona Darlinga

Issues.title: Problemy
Issues.subtitle: {count} problem u {categoryCount} katehoriyakh. Znajdity svoyu.
Issues.noResults: Problemi ne znaydeni. Sprobuyty inshyy poshuk abo kategoriyu.

IssueDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Dokumentuyty, shcho trapylyayetsya — translyuyte abo podelytyesya fotohrafiyamy, videozapy ta posylannyamy.
IssueDetail.riotReelsDesc: Komichni ta ironichni videozapy, yaki perekazu dukha tsiyi Quiet Riot.
IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Entuziyasty-dobrovolʹci, yaki hlybshe rozbyrayutʹsya — perekladalchi, spetsialisty, lidery presy, yurydalʹni konsultanty.
IssueDetail.pendingBanner: Tsya Quiet Riot perehlyadadyetsya — vy mozhete zbyrayty dokazy ta podilʹytysy svojimy dumkamy pid chas perelihlyadu.

Organisations.title: Orhanizaciyi
Organisations.subtitle: Perehlyadayty orhanizaciyi ta bachyty, yaki problemy lyudy z nymy mayutʹ.
Organisations.noResults: Orhanizaciy ne znaydeno dlya tsiyi katehoriyi.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: Kilʹka problem zazvychay stanovlyatʹ 80% usikh skarg. Topʹ problemy nyzhe ranzhyrovani za kilʹkistyu lyudey, yaki yikh stosuyutʹsya.

ActionInitiatives.title: Akciyjni proyekty
ActionInitiatives.subtitle: {count} {count, plural, one {proyekt} other {proyektiv}} zamovlyayutʹ poslugy dlya kolektyvnoyi diyi.
ActionInitiatives.noResults: Akciyjnykh proyektiv ne znaydeno. Sprobuyty inshyy filʹtr.

ActionInitiativeDetail.topUpFirst: Spochatku popovnity svoiy koshelek, shchob rozpochaty.
ActionInitiativeDetail.createAccountPrompt: Stvoryty akkaunt ta zaladuvaty koshelek, shchob zamovyty tsyu posluhu.
ActionInitiativeDetail.completedMessage: Tsej proyekt buv {status}. Dyakuyu vsim {count} uchasnykalm!

Assistants.title: Asystenty
Assistants.subtitle: {count} par AI ahentiv ta lyudskykh orhanizatoriv, yaki dopomahayyutʹ ryoteram diyaty.
Assistants.bannerSubtitle: U kozhnoi katehorii ye vydilenyi AI-agent ta lyudyna-orhanizator dlya dopomohy.

AssistantDetail.riotsWeHelp: Quiet Riots, z yakymy my dopomahayemo
AssistantDetail.openRole: Rol lyudskoho orhanizatora vidkryta dlya bud-koho z pasy do tsiyi katehoriyi. Vyraztyty svoyu zacikalenistʹ nyzhe.

Wallet.title: Vash koshelek
Wallet.createPromptDesc: Stvoryty bezkoshtovnyy akkaunt, shchob zaladuvaty koshelek i zamovyty posluhy dlya akciynykh proyektiv.

Profile.title: Vash profil
Profile.findIssues: Znajdity problemy, yaki vas zajmayutʹ, i pryyednaytyesya do rukhu.
Profile.noConnectedAccounts: Akountiv pov'yazano ne bulo. Uviytyesya cherez Google abo Facebook, shchob pov'yazaty sviy akkaunt.
Profile.cannotUnlinkLast: Ne mozhete vidv'yazaty vashu yedynu pov'yazanyy akkaunt
Profile.deactivateConfirm: Vy pevni, shcho khochete deaktyvuvaty svoiy akkaunt? Vy mozhete yoho reaktyvuvaty u mezhakh 30 dniv.
Profile.unlinkPhoneConfirm: Vy pevni, shcho khochete vidv'yazaty vashu nomer telefonu? Vy ne zmozhete sya uviyty z yoho dopomohoyu.
Profile.codeSentToPhone: Kod perevirky buv vidpravljenoyu na vash WhatsApp.
Profile.cannotUnlinkPhone: Ne mozhete vidv'yazaty vash yedynyy metod autentyfikaciyi
Profile.passwordTooShort: Parol maye buty co najmenshe 10 znakyv
Profile.passwordBreached: Tsej parol z'opyvsya u nyzky danykh. Budʹ laska, vyberyty inshyy.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Uvijdity u vash oblik Quiet Riots
Auth.joinSubtitle: Orhanizujte navkolo spil'nykh problem. Diyte razom.
Auth.signInLinkSent: My vidpravljly posylannya dlya vkhodu na vashu adresu elektronnoyi posty. Klykni'te na posylannya, shchob prodovzhyty.
Auth.signUpLinkSent: My vidpravljly posylannya dlya vkhodu na vashu adresu elektronnoyi posty. Klykni'te na posylannya, shchob stvoryty sviy oblik.
Auth.verifyDesc: Posylannya dlya vkhodu vidpravleno na vashu adresu elektronnoyi posty. Klykni'te na posylannya, shchob prodovzhyty.
Auth.errorAccess: Dostup zaboroneno. Mozhlivo, vy ne maye'te dozvolu na vkhid.
Auth.errorVerification: Posylannya dlya vkhodu zanyshlo sroku diyy abo vzhe bulo vykorystano.
Auth.emailBody: Klykni'te na knopku nyzhe, shchob uviyty u vash oblik. Tse posylannya zakanchy'ye sroku za 24 hodyny.
Auth.emailIgnore: Yakscho vy ne prosyly cy'y emal, vy mozhe'te bezpechno joho ihnoruvaty.
Auth.codeSent: Kod pidtverdzhennya vidpravljy'y na vashy'y WhatsApp.
Auth.codeExpired: Kod zakanchy'y sroku. Bud' laska, sprosyty' novyy.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Haslo musty'y buty ne mensh 10 symvoliv
Auth.wrongPassword: Neverna adresa elektronnoyi posty abo haslo
Auth.emailAlreadyExists: Oblik z tsijeyu adresoyu elektronnoyi posty vzhe isnuye
Auth.noPasswordSet: Haslo ne vstanovleno. Vykorystovuy'te charodiynyy kod abo vstanovit' haslo u svomu profili.
Auth.passwordBreached: Tse haslo z'yavylasya u narusheni danyh. Bud' laska, vybery'te inshe.
Auth.emailOrPhone: Adresa elektronnoyi posty abo nomer telefonu (+44...)
Auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Vvedit' svoyu adresu elektronnoyi posty, i my vidpravymo vam posylannya dlya restartu hasl.
Auth.resetEmailSentDesc: Yakscho oblik isnuye z tsijeyu adresoyu, my vidpravljly posylannya dlya restartu hasl. Perevir'te inbox.
Auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Vybery'te nove haslo dlya vashoho obliku.
Auth.resetPasswordSuccessDesc: Vashe haslo perestavleno. Teper vy mozhe'te uviyty z novym hashlom.
Auth.resetEmailBody: Klykni'te na knopku nyzhe, shchob restartuva'ty vashe haslo. Tse posylannya zakanchy'ye sroku za 1 hodyny.
Auth.resetEmailIgnore: Yakscho vy ne prosyly restarty hasl, vy mozhe'te bezpechno joho ihnoruvaty.

GlobalError.title: Scho-nebud' pishlo ne tak
GlobalError.description: Vidbulasya neochikuvana pomylka. Nasha komanda bula spovidomlena.

NotFound.title: Storinka ne znajdena
NotFound.description: Storinka, yaku vy shukayete, ne isnuye abo bula peremischena.

Transactions.title: Ostanni'y Tranzakstiyi'y
Transactions.empty: Tranzaktsiyi'y shche ne ma. Popovnit' sviy koky'y, shchob rozpochatyy!

Feed.empty: Postiv shche ne ma. Budyy pershyy, khto podilyt'sya!

Actions.noResults: Zhodnih diyal'nostey ne vidpovidaye vashym fil'tram. Sprobuy'te rozshyryty vybir.

Reels.empty: Rolykiv shche ne ma. Budyy pershyy, khto podamy't' odon!
Reels.submitPrompt: Ye u vas smiyshne video, yake pidsumuye tsyu problem?
Reels.submitSuccess: Dyakuy'yu! Vashy'y rolik podanyy na reviyu.

TopUp.simulated: Symulsovane popovnennya dlya testuvannya. Realni'y platezhi'y skoro z'yavlyatsya.
TopUp.failed: Popovnennya ne vdalosya. Bud laska, sprobuyte shche raz.

Pay.insufficientFunds: Nedostatno koshtiv. Spochatku popovni sviy galman.
Pay.networkError: Pomylka merezhi. Budʹ laska, sprobuyteʺ znovu.
Pay.failed: Platizh ne vdavsya. Bud laska, sprobuyte shche raz.

Claim.success: Dyakuyemo! My zafiksuvaly vashu zatsikavistyuvannya do roli {name}. My z'yasuyemosya z vamy.
Claim.placeholder: Chomu vy budʺte vidminnymy v roli {name}? (neobovʹyazkovo)

Evidence.photoFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF. Maksymalno 4 MB kozhnoya.
Evidence.empty: Dokazy shche ne zibrani. Budte pershym, khto zadokumentuye te, shcho vidbuvaietsia.

ProfileEdit.title: Redahuvannya profilyu
ProfileEdit.skillsHint: Rozdeleni komeyu. Dopomahaytʹ znayty vidpovidni diyi.

CookieConsent.title: Preferences dlya cookies
CookieConsent.description: My vykorystovuyemo cookies, shchob vy zalistysia avtoryzovany ta pokrashchuvalysya vashe dosvidu. Analitychni cookies dopomahaytʹ nam rozumity, yak vykorystovuyetsya sait.
CookieConsent.essentialDescription: Neobkhidne dlya roboty saytu. Ne mozhe byty vymknute.
CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Dopomozhy nam rozumity, yak vy vykorystovuyete sait, shchob my mohly yoho pokrashchyty.

Onboarding.interestsSubtitle: Vybrity katehoriyi, shcho vam vazhlyvi. My pokazhemo vam vidpovidni problemy ta diyi.
Onboarding.interestsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {Zhodnyh katehoriy ne vybrano} one {1 katehoriya vybrana} other {# katehoriy vybrany}}
Onboarding.languageSubtitle: My vyznachyly movu vashoho brauzer. Vy mozhete yiyi zminyty tut.
Onboarding.countrySubtitle: Tse dopomozhe nam pokazaty vam mistsevi problemy ta vstanovyty vashu valyutu.
Onboarding.countrySkip: Spysok krajin nedostupnyy. Vy mozhtete tsʹo vstanovyty piznishe v svoyemu profili.

SuggestPage.title: Zaproponuvaty novyy Quiet Riot
SuggestPage.subtitle: Ne mozhete znayty svoyu problemu? Zaproponuyteʺ novyy Quiet Riot, i my yoho perevirymo.

SuggestForm.namePlaceholder: napryklad, Vytraty na mobilʹni dani, Kryza potʹyazyv...
SuggestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Rozkazhyteʺ nam bilʹshe pro tsyu problemu...
SuggestForm.publicRecognition: Pokazaty mene yak pershoho Quiet Riotera (zminti, shchob zalyshytysya anonimy)
SuggestForm.successMessage: Vash Quiet Riot teper u zali ochikuvannya. Setup Guide perevyryty yoho protiahom hodyny. Vy mozhete zbyraty dovedennya ta dilytysya svoyimyʺ dumkamyʺ pid chas perevirky.
SuggestForm.networkError: Pomylka merezhi — budʹ laska, sprobuyteʺ znovu

RejectionReasons.title: Chomu Quiet Riots vidkhodyayut
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Rozuminnyaʺ protsesu perevirky
RejectionReasons.intro: Kozhna propozyciya dlya noveho Quiet Riot perevireayetsya Setup Guide, shchob perevirytysya, shcho vona vidpovidaye platformi ta mozhe robyty spravzhnyy vplyv. Os prychyny, z yakykh propozyciya mozhlyvo ne bude zatverdzhenoyu
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Yaksho vashe zaproponovane duzhe podobne do Quiet Riot, shcho uzhe isnuye, my zlʹyshchymo vashu propozyciyuʺ u isnuychuyu. Tse tymyʺ spilʹnotu zoseredzheneyu ta zapobihaye fragmentatsiyi. Bilʹshe lyudey za odnym Quiet Riot — bilʹshyy vplyv.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Koly tse stanesya, vy avtomatchno dodani do isnuychoho Quiet Riot, shchob vy mohly rozpochatyʺ diyalʹnostʹ vidrazhu zh.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleTitle: Pro lyudey, a ne pro problemy
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots — pro spalʹni problemy, ne pro spryamovanyaʺ na okremyh osib. My zoseredzhuyemosya na systemnyh problemah — takyh yak poganiy broadband, zrostannyaʺ vitrat na enerhiyu abo nedostatnyasʺ medychnaysʺ opika — a ne na osobystyh pretenziyah do konkretynyh lyudey.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Yaksho vy rozcharovani v konkretnoyu osoboyu abo publichnoyu postattyu, sprobuyteʺ sformuluvaty tse yak pryblizhlyvu problemu. Napryklad, zamist tsilyuvannya CEO, zaproponuyteʺ Quiet Riot pro praktyku kompaniyi.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: My ne mozhemo hostytysya Quiet Riots, shcho promovuyutʹ abo orhanizovuyutʹ nelehalni aktyvinosti. Tse vklyuchaetʹ bud-shcho, shcho porushaye diyuche zakonodavstvo, promovuye nasilstvo abo mozhe postavyty lyudey pid zahrozu.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Inody propozyciya mozhlyvo ne vidpovidaye z inshoyu prychynoyu — mozhlyvo, yona zanadto rozplyvchasta, abo Setup Guide potrybue bilʹshe informatsiyi. V tsʹomu vpadku vy otrymayeteʺ povidomlennyaʺ, shcho poyasnyuye, chomu, ta shcho vy mozhete robyty dali.
RejectionReasons.whatNextIntro: Yaksho vashu propozyciyuʺ vidkhyleno, vy zavzhdy mozhtete:
RejectionReasons.reframe: Pereformulmvaty i sprobuvaty znovu — zminyty imʹya abo opys, shchob krashche vidpovidaty kryteryiyam
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Prystupyty do isnuychoho Quiet Riot — vashe pitannyaʺ mozhe uzhe baty rozpiznane
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Vidpovidyty Setup Guide — yaksho vy vvazhayete, shcho vidmova bula pomylkoyuʺ, vyslaty povidomlennyaʺ z poyasnyuvannyaʺ vashoho vypadku

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonimni pershe riotery
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Shcho oznachaye baty anonimy
AnonymousInfo.intro: Koly khtos pochynaytʹ novyy Quiet Riot, vin staye pershym Quiet Rioterom. Tse — badge chesti — lyudyna, yaka mala smilyvist pershoyu rozpovisti pro tsʹo.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Ne kozhniy khoche, shchob yikhne imʹya buloʺ prychepnyaʺ do problemy publichno. Tse absolulyutno normalyno. Koly pershyy Quiet Rioter vybyraye zalyshytysya anonimoyu:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Yihne imʹya ta foto profilyu shovayutsya na storintsi problemy
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Anonimnyy znachok pokazuyetsya zamist, tomu lyudy znayutʹ, shcho khtos tse pochynavy, ale ne znayutʹ koho
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides vse oshche znayutʹ, khto tse pochynavy (dlya tsiley moderatsiyi)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: Pershyy Rioter mozhe zminyty dumku piznishe ta vybrary baty publichno vyznanyʺ
AnonymousInfo.whyIntro: Ye bahato spravedlyvyh prychin zalyshytysya anonimoyu:
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Vy pratsyuyte dlya kompaniyi, pov'yazanoyi z problemoyu
AnonymousInfo.whyCause: Vy vilʹnishe dayetʹ spravy mozhlyvistʹ hovoruty sama za sebe
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Yaksho vy pochaly Quiet Riot anonimy, ale piznishe virishuvatete, shcho khochete buty vyznanymy, vy mozhtete onovyty svoyu preference budʹ-koly cherez vashu postkaskkuʺ abo vyslanyaʺ povidomlennyaʺ Setup Guide.

Setup.title: Poradnyk Setup
Setup.subtitle: Perehlyad ta keruvannya suhasten' Quiet Riot
Setup.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {1 suhastennya} other {# suhastennya}} chekaye na perehlyad
Setup.translationsBeingGenerated: Pereklady generuyutsya avtomatychno — onovit storinku pryblyzno cherez 30 sekund.
Setup.translationSlower: Pereklad zainyav bilshe chasu, nizh ochikuvalosya. Sprobuyte znovu abo onovit cherez khvylynu.

Admin.title: Administraciya
Admin.subtitle: Keruvannya korystuvachamy ta rolyamy
Admin.searchPlaceholder: Poshuk po imeni, poshti abo telefonu...
Admin.noRoleHolders: Zhodnym korystuvacham shche ne pryznachu roli.

FirstRioterInfo.title: Pershyy Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: Shcho oznachaye rozpochaty Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Kozhnyy Quiet Riot pochynayet'sya z odniyeyi lyudyny — Pershoho Quiet Riotera. Tse osoba, yaka maye muzhnist' rozpovisti pro problemu ta zapochaty rukh dlya zminy.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Buttya pershoyu osoboyu, yaka pidnyala problemu, prynose spetsial'ne pryznachennya:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Permanent'nyy znachok Pershoho Quiet Riotera na storinci problemy
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: Vibir buly publichno pryznanymy abo zalystysy anonimnymy
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Avtomatychne chlenstvo yak pershoji osoby pryYednanoji do Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Novyny, koly vashu suhastennya perehlen, odobren abo puston' zhyvo
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: Shcho Ochikuyet'sya vid Pershykh Quiet Rioterts?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: Buttya Pershym Quiet Rioterm — tse znachok pochutu, ne tya zhenshhyna. Strohykhykh vymo h nema, ale my zakhidyuyemo Pershykhiv Quiet Rioteriv do:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Chempion problemy shlyakhom poyukannya yiyi z inshymy, komu vona vazhlyva
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Podilytysya dokazamy ta istoriamy, yaki ilyustruyut' problemu
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: Vistupyty opozyciy novymy chlenamy, yaki pryyednuyyut'sya do Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Koly vy proponuyete noveyo Quiet Riot, vy vybiraye, yak vy khochete buty pryznany:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Publichne — vashe im'ya ta profil' z'yavlyayut'sya na stor?nci problemy yak Pershyy Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anonimne — zamist' cioho poyukayet'sya anonimnyy znachok, zakhyshchayuchy vashu identychnist'
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Vy mozhetye zminyty svoyi preferenciyu budy-yakyd chasu cherez vashu skryn'ku abo zv'yazavshys' z Setup Poradnykom
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Prosto proponuyte novyy Quiet Riot cherez veb-sayt abo WhatsApp bot. Yakshho vashu suhastennya odobryat' Setup Poradnyky, vy stanete Pershym Quiet Rioterm dlya tsiyi problemy.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Vasha suhastennya prokhodyt' recenzenciiyu, de Setup Poradnyky pereviryyut', scho vona vidpovidaye nastanovam. Vony mozhut' poprosyty dod. informatsiyu, zaproponuvaty ob'yednannya z isnuyuchoyu problemoyu abo odobryty yiyi puston' zhyvo.

Share.title: Vasha Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Dovidajtes bilshe pro vashu Quiet Riots share →
Share.heroSubtitle: Kozhnij Quiet Rioter u vsiomu sviti proponyjetsjya odna share u Quiet Riots — samij kompaniji.
Share.ownershipDesc: Yak akcionar, vy volodijete realnoju chastynoju Quiet Riots. Ce ne token, ne badge i ne metafora — ce spravzhnja share u UK limited company, zareyestrovana v Companies House.
Share.ownershipPoint1: Vy stajete yurydychnym spivvolodiyem Quiet Riots
Share.ownershipPoint2: Vasha share roste v vartosti razom z rostom kompaniji
Share.ownershipPoint3: Vy mozhlyvlo otrymate dyvidentydy, yaksho kompanija rozpodiliyt prybutky
Share.ownershipPoint4: U vas ye prava akcionara za UK company law
Share.considerationDesc: Za UK company law (Companies Act 2006), shares ne mozhna vydavaty bezkoshtovno. Nominalnyj platizh — zvanyj consideration — vymagajet szya dlya toho, shchob share bula yurydychno diisnoju.
Share.considerationAmount: Consideration dlya vashoyi share — 10 pensiv (abo ekvivalent u vasijij lokalnij valjuti).
Share.considerationWallet: Ce vidkatyvajet szya z vashoho Quiet Riots wallet, koly vy prociduete.
Share.considerationRefund: Yaksho vashu zayavu vidklonjato, 10p avtomatychno povertajet szya u vashhij wallet.
Share.growthSharesTitle: Yak ce pracyuje na riznykh valuacijakh
Share.growthSharesDesc: Vasha share vykorystovuje growth share structure — specialnyj klas, shcho staje vartisnym lyshe pry viznachenij valjuaciji kompaniji. Ce oznachaje minimalni podatky na chas vydachi.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares vydayutsjya za nominalnjyu vartistju. Vy platytsya 10p. Nemaye znachushchyh podatkovih podij.
Share.seedDesc: Ta zh nominalna vartist. Growth share hurdle vstanovlyvajet szya vyhche potochnoyi valjuaciji.
Share.seriesADesc: Prava pre-empsiji viddanymy dlya user share pool. Hurdle minimizuje potochnu vartist.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle zabezpechuye obmezhjenu potochnu vartist, nezvazhajuchy na vysoku valjuaciju kompaniji.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool — ce vyznachenyj vidsotok cap table. Nemaye novykh rozmyvajuchy kh vydachen.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares peretvoryuyutsjya na zvychaini torhivni shares. Podatok na kapitalni prybutky mozhe zastosovuvatysya pry prodazhi.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Volodinja share prynosyt z soboyu deyaki vidpovidalnisti:
Share.responsibility1: Podatkovi zobov'yazannja zalezhyty vid vashoji kraji provedennja — konsultujte szya z kvalifikovanym konsultantom
Share.responsibility2: Nemaye harantiji, shcho kompanija dosyagne bud-yakyji valjuaciji
Share.responsibility3: Struktura share mozhe buty zminjeno razom z rostom kompaniji
Share.responsibility4: Ce ne yurydychna, podatkova abo investycija porady
Share.disclaimer1: Ce sproshhene poyasnennja — ne yurydychna, podatkova abo investycija porady.
Share.disclaimer2: Podatkovi zobov'yazannja kozhnoho user-a zalezhyty vid jogo kraji provedennja.
Share.disclaimer3: Nemaye harantiji, shcho kompanija dosyagne bud-yakyji valjuaciji.
Share.disclaimer4: Struktura share mozhe buty zminjeno razom z rostom kompaniji.
Share.disclaimer5: Users povinni konsultuvaty szya z kvalifikovanymy konsultantamy u svoyij vlasnyj krajini.
Share.eligibilityDesc: Dlya toho, shchob kvalifikuvatysya dlya share offer, vy povynnni:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Buty verefijovanym user-om (imja ta email abo telefon pidtverdzheni)
Share.proceedDesc: Hotovi staty akcionarom? 10p consideration bude vidkatyvajet szya z vashoho wallet.
Share.proceedConfirm: Nominalnyj platizh 10p bude vidkatyvajet szya z vashoho wallet. Ce yurydychna vymoha dlya toho, shchob share bula diisnoju.
Share.proceedSuccess: Vashu zayavu podano! Share Guide pereglyane yji nezabarom.
Share.insufficientFunds: Vy potrybujete shonajmenshe 10p u vashhij wallet, shchob prociduty.
Share.declineDesc: Yaksho vy ne hochete share, vy mozhlyvlo peremano vidklonytty propozyciju. Zhodnoho platizhu ne bude vzyato.
Share.declineConfirm: Vy pevni? Ce peremano i ne mozhe buty vidmineno. Vy nikoly bilshe ne budete propojovani share.
Share.withdrawDesc: Vidminyty vashu zayavu i otrymate povne vozzvernennja 10p.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Vy pevni? Vashhij 10p bude povertanyj u vashhij wallet.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Vashu zayavu viddano. 10p povertanyj u vashhij wallet.
Share.reapplyDesc: Vashu poperednju zayvu vidklonjeno. Vy mozhlyvlo podnovy z novym 10p platizhmom.
Share.passwordDesc: Share sekcija zakhyshhjena parolem dlya vashoyi bezpeky.
Share.networkError: Merezheva pomylka. Budh laska, sprobujte znovu.
Share.identityDesc: Dlya zavershhennja vashoyi share zayvy, nam potribno perevirtyy vashu identychnist. Cya informacija zashyfrovana i zberihajet szya bezpechno.
Share.issueRequestReceived: Vashhij zapyt otrymannyj. My zvjazhemosya z vamy u vidpovidnomu chasi.

Team.searchPlaceholder: Poshuk korystuvachiv za imenom abo elektronoyu pochtoyyu...

BotMessages.noMoreReels: Bilshe nemaye neperehlyanutyh rolykiv dlya tsiyeyi problemy
BotMessages.youAreLive: Vy v pryamomu efiri! Bud'te pryrasnymy, ale shanoblyvymy.
BotMessages.responseSentToGuide: Vashu vidpovid' nadislano do Setup Guide.
BotMessages.verificationEmailSent: Lyst z pidtverdzhennyam nadislano na {email}. Poprosit korystuvacha pereviryty poshtovu skrynku ta natysnuty na posylannya.
BotMessages.verifyEmailPlaceholder: Korystuvach maye zaminnyy email WhatsApp. Vykorystovuyte link_email, shchob vstanovyty spravzhniy email.
BotMessages.shareNeedMore: Vam potribno shche {riots} Quiet Riots ta {actions} diy dlya kvalifikatsiyi.
BotMessages.shareEligible: Vy mayete pravo na aktsiyu Quiet Riots! Vidvidayte sviy profil abo skazhit' "apply for share", shchob prodovzhyty.
BotMessages.shareApplicationStatus: Vasha zayavka na aktsiyu maye status {status}.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Vy kvalifikovani dlya otrymannya aktsiyi Quiet Riots!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Prohres: pryyednalysya do {riotsJoined}/3 Quiet Riots, vykonano {actionsTaken}/10 diy{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Vy shche ne mayete prava na aktsiyu. Pryyednuytes' do bilshoyi kilkosti Quiet Riots ta vykonuyte bilshe diy.
BotMessages.shareCannotApplyStatus: Nemozhlyvo podaty zayavku — vash potochnyy status {status}.
BotMessages.shareInsufficientBalance: Nedostatn'o koshtiv u hamantsi. Vam potribno shchonaymenshe 10p (u vas {balance}p). Spochatku popovnit' hamanets.
BotMessages.shareApplied: 10p vidnyato z vashoho hamantsya. Vashu zayavku na aktsiyu teper rozhlyadayut'. Share Guide skoro yiyi pereviryt'.
BotMessages.shareDeclined: Vy nazavzhdy vidkhylyly propozytsiyu aktsiyi. Platizh ne bulo vzyato. Tse rishennya nemozhlvo skasuvaty.
BotMessages.shareCannotDecline: Nemozhlyvo vidkhylyty — abo u vas nemaye vidpovidnoyi propozytsiyi aktsiyi, abo vashu zayavku vzhe obroblyayut'.
BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Vashu zayavku na aktsiyu vidklykano, i vashi 10p povernuto do hamantsya.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Nemozhlyvo vidklykaty — vashu zayavku mozhe buty ne v stani, shcho dopuskaye vidklykannya.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: 10p vidnyato z vashoho hamantsya. Vashu povtornu zayavku na aktsiyu teper rozhlyadayut'.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Nemozhlyvo podaty povtorno — vashu zayavku mozhe buty ne u vidhylenomu stani.
BotMessages.shareNoApplication: U vas shche nemaye zayavky na aktsiyu.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: Vashe zapytannya nadislano komandi Share Guide. Vy otrymayete vidpovid' u svoyiy poshtoviy skryntsi.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Harni novyny — tviy Quiet Riot "{name}" skhvaleno! My povidomymo tebe, koly vin stane aktyvnym.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Tvoya propozytsiia "{name}" ne otrymala 👍, bo {reason}. Diznatysia bilshe: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
BotMessages.suggestionMerged: Tvoya propozytsiia "{name}" skhozha na isnuiuchyi Quiet Riot. My dodaly tebe — podyvysia: {link}
BotMessages.suggestionGoLive: Tviy Quiet Riot "{name}" teper aktyvnyi! Podilys nym iz druziamy, yakym vazhlyva tsia tema.
BotMessages.rejectionCloseToExisting: zanadto skhozha na isnuiuchyi Quiet Riot
BotMessages.rejectionAboutPeople: spriamovana na liudei, a ne na problemy
